'''E'koth Tassjun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and he trained [[Ephaan Kenzon]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], E'koth Tassjun was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Selecting the young [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Ephaan Kenzon]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Master Tassjun had difficulty controlling the unruly apprentice, often clashing on missions. Padawan Kenzon did not agree with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council's]] stance on several important political issues and frequently questioned their decisions in a very vocal manner.<ref name="POTJ" />

Master Tassjun as well as the Council, discussed the issue with Padawan Kenzon numerous times to no avail. Kenzon's disobedience proved to be too much for the Council to overlook and the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] discussed expelling the young man from the Order. The rift between the Council's views and Tassjun's Padawan came to a climax when the Master-Padawan pair were on a mission in the [[Zeemacht Cluster/Legends|Zeemacht Cluster]]. Despite Tassjun's guidance, Padawan Kenzon could not reconcile his views and those of the High Council and took it upon himself to resign from the Order, forswearing his vows and abandoning his master.<ref name="POTJ" />

==Sources==
